name: Web - Local/Remote File Inclusion (LFI/RFI)
description: Detects Local File Inclusion (LFI) and Remote File Inclusion (RFI) attempts. LFI targets local system files via vulnerable parameters; RFI loads remote URLs. Both can lead to code execution or data exposure.
search: index=web (sourcetype=nginx_access OR sourcetype=apache_access) | eval full_url=uri."|".(if(isnotnull(uri_query), uri_query, "")) | eval lfi_rfi_match=case( match(full_url, "(file|page|path|include|require|doc|template|load|view|content|lang|dir)=.*(\.\./|etc/|proc/|boot/)"), "LFI - Path Traversal in param", match(full_url, "(file|page|path|include|require|template|load|view)=.*(/etc/passwd|/etc/shadow|/etc/hostname|boot\.ini|win\.ini)"), "LFI - Sensitive file", match(full_url, "(file|page|include|require|template|load|view)=.*(https?://|ftp://)"), "RFI - Remote URL inclusion", match(full_url, "php://|data://|expect://|zip://|phar://"), "PHP stream wrapper", match(full_url, "/proc/self/(environ|cmdline|fd)"), "Linux proc access", 1==0, null()) | where isnotnull(lfi_rfi_match) | stats count as attempt_count, values(lfi_rfi_match) as attack_types, values(full_url) as payloads, values(status) as status_codes by src_ip, host | eval severity="high" | eval mitre="T1190" | sort -attempt_count | table src_ip, host, attempt_count, attack_types, payloads, status_codes, severity, mitre
author: SOC Team
